divergences.claim: RatePolicy.admission_mode returns "fixed_window". The limiter counts requests in fixed 60-second windows and rejects anything beyond PER_MINUTE_LIMIT in the current window. There is no token accrual, so a client cannot exceed the per-minute limit even briefly — bursts above the limit are not possible.
divergences.prose: RatePolicy.admission_mode returns "fixed_window". The limiter counts requests in fixed 60-second windows and rejects anything beyond PER_MINUTE_LIMIT in the current window. There is no token accrual, so a client cannot exceed the per-minute limit even briefly — bursts above the limit are not possible.
